real_interview.content: <synch>

IntroV4Confirmation (hi i'm ellie thanks for coming in today i was created to talk to people in a safe and secure environment i'm not a therapist but i'm here to learn about people and would love to learn about you i'll ask a few questions to get us started and please feel free to tell me anything your answers are totally confidential are you ok with this)
yes
okay_confirm (okay)
how_doingV (so how are you doing today)
i'm fine
thats_good (that's good)
where_originally (where are you from originally)
um florida
really (really)
when_LA (when did you move to l_a)
um about two to three months ago
often_backB (how often do you go back to your hometown)
i haven't been back as yet
compares_LA (how does it compare to l_a)
um
it's basically the same nice sunny weather
why_LA (why did you move to l_a)
um
for a career purpose um entertainment
cool3 (cool)
adapted_LA (how easy was it for you to get used to living in l_a)
not very difficult because um the people are very friendly
thats_good (that's good)
like_about_LA (what are some things you really like about l_a)
oh definitely the weather
um the upbeat environment
and um the opportunities for uh
um entertainment career
mhm (mhm)
dont_like_LA (what are some things you don't really like about l_a)
earthquakes <laughter>
see_mean (i see what you mean)
travel_shoes (i'm sure you can tell by my shoes i'm not much of a world explorer do you travel a lot)
mm i travel a lot within the united states yes
travel_changed (what do you enjoy about traveling)
i love seeing new places and um
the different sceneries and meeting new people
uh_huh (uh huh)
travel_trips (i'd love to hear about one of your trips)
mm <sigh> one of my trips oh
utah i just love the scenery in utah the so the
the the rocks the the different sculptures of the rocks and the landscape was just fascinating
mhm (mhm)
memorableB (what's one of your most memorable experiences)
mm memorable experiences um
i don't think i really have an outstanding one because um
i just enjoy seeing different sceneries so i don't think there's any one particular one that stands out
okay_confirm (okay)
study (what did you study at school)
i just did um two years um
two years of college and it was in um
social science
still_doing_X (are you still doing that)
no
dream_job (what's your dream job)
my dream job is
well i assist in
my husband entertainment but my dream job is um i guess <laughter> one day to be a model but it's a bit
i'm a bit too old for that now <laughter>
shyoutgoing (do you consider yourself more shy or outgoing)
shy <laughter>
why2 (why)
i guess i'm more of an introvert so i guess i'm more shy
okay_confirm (okay)
relax_fishtank (sometimes when i'm feeling tense i turn on the fish tank screensaver hey i know it's not hawaii but it's the best i've got what do you do to relax)
mhm <laughter>
oh i listen to music
like_what (like what)
inspirational music
nice (nice)
control_temper (how are you at controlling your temper)
i'm pretty good
thats_good (that's good)
last_argument (when was the last time you argued with someone and what was it about)
mm
argue my daughter
um it what was it
tell_about_that (can you tell me about that)
what was it about
her just being disrespectful
describe_felt (how did you feel in that moment)
i felt angry
mhm (mhm)
family_relationship (tell me about your relationship with your family)
mm i have a great relationship <laughter>
we get along well
family_roleB (how close are you to your family)
um we're quite close we get along very well
thats_great (that's great)
situation_handled (tell me about a situation that you wish you had handled differently)
mm
handled different
um
i can't think of any right now
hard_decisionB (tell me about the hardest decision you've ever had to make)
mm
probably um
mm staying <st> mm staying away from my mother for a
good many years
change_directions (what made you decide to do that)
oh because of relationships problems that i had to adjust to with her
happy_didthat (are you happy you did that)
mm not really mhm
tell_about_that (can you tell me about that)
scrubbed_entry
okay_confirm (okay)
feelguilty (what's something you feel guilty about)
guilty
mm sometimes i eat
more sweets <s> sweets than i should desserts than i should
wild_laughter3 ((laughter))
<laughter>
influence_positive (who's someone that's been a positive influence in your life)
mm a positive influence
um
my
my husband my aunts
my daughters <laughter>
tell_about_that (can you tell me about that)
a positive influence um well in my husband's case he believes in
he believes in achieving setting high goals and you should be confident about yourself and think highly of yourself so
he's he's um great in that area
mhm (mhm)
easy_sleep (how easy is it for you to get a good night's sleep)
um very easy
sleep_affects (what are you like when you don't sleep well)
grouchy <laughter>
feel_lately (how have you been feeling lately)
mm
sometimes a little tired but other than that it's i'm okay <laughter>
okay_confirm (okay)
behavior_changes (have you noticed any changes in your behavior or thoughts lately)
no
ptsd_diagnosed (have you ever been diagnosed with p_t_s_d)
no
depression_diagnosed (have you been diagnosed with depression)
no
happy_lasttime (tell me about the last time you felt really happy)
the last time i felt very happy
um <sigh> very happy i usually feel happy but not very happy
um oh
i get very happy when i'm gonna travel the last time was relocating to los angeles
thats_great (that's great)
Ellie17Dec2012_10 (tell me about something you did recently that you really enjoyed)
mm
i really enjoyed
oh on the weekend i went to a
um an activity heritage um weekend and
the screening of a movie and i really enjoyed it
on the weekend
thats_great (that's great)
BF_describe (how would your best friend describe you)
mm
i don't know <laughter> calm
mm shy <laughter>
mhm (mhm)
mm i really don't know <laughter>
okay_confirm (okay)
self_change (what are some things you wish you could change about yourself)
um
my size
my weight
feelbadly (tell me about a time when someone made you feel really badly about yourself)
mm
i guess whenever i'm called fat <laughter> that i'm i'm fat
okay_confirm (okay)
Ellie17Dec2012_07 (what would you say are some of your best qualities)
i think i'm patient
um i love people i love helping people
uh
regret (is there anything you regret)
mm
yes <laughter>
tell_about_that (can you tell me about that)
no that's a bit personal <laughter>
advice_back (what advice would you give to yourself ten or twenty years ago)
what advice would i give myself ten twenty years
mm always aim for the best
and be the best do the best that you can every day
uh_huh (uh huh)
kids_elaborate (tell me about your kids)
mm
they're great kids sometimes they get out of hand sometimes disrespectful but overall they're great
easy_parent (do you find it easy to be a parent)
yes it's quite easy um
yeah because of help from
the help <he> help from my father <f> their father my husband he's a
a disciplinarian so it's a bit easy for me <laughter>
parent_best (what's the best thing about being a parent)
uh <sigh>
the best thing about being a parent is to see
to see uh uh
a a person that you gave birth to develop into
develop into a wholesome person and
take the values that you taught them and kept the values
that you taught them and
continue to to excel in in their life
yeah3 (yeah)
parent_hardest (what's the hardest thing about being a parent)
the hardest thing about being a parent is um
seeing your child sick or seeing them in a situation where you have no control and you can't do anything about it
it's very difficult then you want to be able to
you want to be able to
be there in every situation or have control of every situation and some things you just can't
like sickness mhm
yeah_downer (yeah)
give_example (can you give me an example of that)
like i said like if
if one of my children is sick i feel
i do the best that i can but to see them in pain and i feel like i want to
i wish i was able to take that pain whenever they're going through anything i wish i was able to take it instead of them
hmm_downer (hmm)
parent_differences (what are some ways that you're different as a parent than your parents)
i think with me i'm more sacrificial than my
mom was to me um more um i think
my demonstration of love is a bit more than she was to me
Ellie17Dec2012_08 (what are you most proud of in your life)
that i'm most proud of
i'm proud of having a family i guess because it's something that i always wanted in life um to have a family
and i guess i'm most proud of that
asked_everything (okay i think i have asked everything i need to)
appreciate_open (thanks for sharing your thoughts with me)
mm
bye (goodbye)
bye
